clean_text: BACARDÍ Coquito | Coconut Liqueur | Coconut Liqueur Drinks | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS Coquito A cream-based coconut liqueur, Coquito is a traditional Puerto Rican Holiday cocktail. BACARDÍ Coquito is made with BACARDÍ Superior Rum and a mix of vanilla, cinnamon and other festive spices. DANCE WITH FLAVOuR TASTING NOTES A silky coconut flavor, toasty spices and hints of vanilla and cinnamon that celebrate the Caribbean culture and holidays. Looking for an authentic, delicious Caribbean cocktail this holiday season? Look no further than BACARDÍ Coquito SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone. Follow us on social to stay up-to-date with the latest BACARDÍ news. #DoWhatMovesYou OUR RECOMMENDED RUMS LIKE THIS? TRY THESE If you enjoy this rum, here’s our recommendations of other BACARDĺ rums we think you’ll like VIEW RUMS BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA BACARDÍ SPICED BACARDÍ COCONUT BACARDÍ CARTA ORO BACARDÍ AÑEJO CUATRO VIEW RUMS MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? What is the difference between dark, gold and white rum? The color of rum helps us know what flavors it brings. Dark is sweet and smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth and subtle. HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM? We make rum by distilling sugarcane molasses and fermenting it with yeast and water. Rum originates from Barbados with its roots going back as far as the 17th century. Is rum sweet? Many think that, since rum is made from sugar cane, it must be sweet. But rum comes in a range of sweetness, from barely-there to an all-out sugar rush. metadata.description: BACARDÍ Coquito, Coquito meaning “Little Coconut” in Spanish is a festive, Puerto Rican holiday drink that is synonymous with BACARDÍ's Caribbean roots.
